summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GlideQuantum Labs website with Resend email notifications. All email functionality working correctly.

POST /api/book-demo creates booking and triggers email notification (confirmed in logs)
Frontend contact form submission works end-to-end with success toast
Book Demo modal full flow works (date → time → details → success screen)
All page sections load correctly (hero, industries, services, process, testimonials, FAQ)
WhatsApp chat widget is present and functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 98% (13/13 core features working)
